Uses of Class
org.kink_lang.kink.Vm

Packages that use Vm
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink
The core package of the Kink vm.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph.impl
Implementations of the Execution Graph DSL.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.callstack
Call stacks used in the evaluator.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile
Compiles itree to FunVal by runtime bytecode generation.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.classgen
Generates compiled classes.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir
Intermediate representation before JVM byte code compilation.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.tempval
Temporary vals used by generated code.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.intrinsicsupport
Provides funs used from intrinsics.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.java
Package of JAVA etc.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.random
The internal classes for mods under kink/random.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.stopwatch
Provides kink/STOPWATCH mod.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec
Internal representation of vec vals.

    Description

    Returns a nullary fun raising cond-result-not-bool error.

    Returns a fun to raise cond-not-bool exception.

    static FunVal

    Returns not-vec-rhs fun, which takes no arg.
    static FunVal

    Returns a nullary fun to raise sym-not-str error.
    static FunVal

    Returns a nullary fun to raise an exception of an error of new_val.
    static FunVal

    Returns wrong-number-of-args fun, which takes no args.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, List<? extends Val> list)
    Returns a new vec internal containing the elements of the list.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val e0)
    Returns a new vec internal.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val[] array, int from, int to)
    Returns a new vec containing elements between from (inclusive) and to (exclusive) on the array.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val e0, Val e1)
    Returns a new vec internal.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val e0, Val e1, Val e2)
    Returns a new vec internal.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val e0, Val e1, Val e2, Val e3)
    Returns a new vec internal.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.ofCapa(Vm vm, int capa)
    Returns a new empty vec internal with the specified capa.
